title: Sweet Velvety Turkish Bread Toast
description: A sweet and festive Turkish dish featuring ground allspice, toasted bread, and a dairy-free friendly twist. Perfect for a snack or dessert, this treat is sure to delight.
instructions: Slice the Turkish bread into 1-inch thick slices and toast until lightly browned.
In a small saucepan, combine the coconut oil, granulated sugar, ground allspice, and rose water. Heat over low heat, stirring until the sugar dissolves.
In a separate saucepan, whisk together the non-dairy milk and cornstarch. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens.
Brush the toasted bread slices with the sugar and spice mixture.
Drizzle the thickened milk mixture over the bread slices.
If using pine nuts, sprinkle them over the top of the bread.
Bake the bread slices in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
